name: Seafood Mediterranee
recipeIngredient: 18 oz Lobster Tails, thawed if Frozen, each cut in thirds Crosswise
16 oz Can Italian Plum Tomatoes, Cut up
1 lb Medium Shrimp, peeled and Deveined, with shell left On tail
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the clams.
2. Soak in salt water for 15 minutes. Drain and rinse. Repeat soaking process twice.
3. In an 8 quart pot, sauté garlic in hot olive oil over medium-high heat until lightly cooked but not brown.
4. Add lobster tail pieces and stir well.
5. Add white wine, tomatoes, parsley, oregano, salt, pepper, and bay leaves. Mix well.
6. Arrange shrimp and clams on top of the stew.
7. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat. Cover and steam for 5-8 minutes until clams have opened and shrimp and lobster are opaque when cut in center.
8. Discard any unopened clams and bay leaves before serving stew in bowls.
